vocab.api: Define endpoints with @app.get(), @app.post(), etc. Use Pydantic models for request/response validation — FastAPI auto-generates OpenAPI docs from them. Use APIRouter for modular routing.
vocab.authentication: Use FastAPI's OAuth2PasswordBearer for token-based auth. Validate JWTs using python-jose. Use Depends() for dependency injection of the current user into any route.
vocab.database: Use SQLAlchemy 2.0 with async support (AsyncSession). Define models with SQLAlchemy ORM. Use Alembic for migrations. For simpler projects, SQLModel (combines SQLAlchemy + Pydantic) is recommended.
vocab.background: Use FastAPI BackgroundTasks for fire-and-forget tasks. For heavy workloads or retries, use Celery with Redis as broker.
vocab.validation: Pydantic v2 models handle all input validation automatically. Define Field() constraints for min/max length, regex patterns, etc. Use model_validator for cross-field validation.
